## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Guy Scherzer's background and potential fit for a Client Operations role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Guy has a diverse background in RevOps, strategic finance, and early-stage startups, with experience in automating processes and improving operational efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [growthx.ai is rapidly growing (approaching $7M ARR, 40+ accounts) and needs to scale operations, particularly in client health tracking and team enablement](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [The role involves improving client health tracking, automating processes, and potentially expanding into broader RevOps responsibilities in the future](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Role Context

  - [Kyle joined growthx.ai in October, previously had 19 years of growth experience](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Company growth: From $1M+ ARR to approaching $7M, 15 to 40+ accounts](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Role focuses on:](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [Improving client health tracking (using tools like Notion, FAB)](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
      - [Automating processes and setting new expectations for manual inputs](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Team enablement, including hiring and onboarding improvements](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)

### Guy's Professional Background

  - [Started in investment management at Hall Capital for 3 years](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Joined Slack in early 2018 on the BizOps team (200M ARR, pre-IPO)](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
      - [Role evolved into RevOps, strategic finance, and corporate strategy](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
      - [Focused on scaling sales team and operations](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Moved to Sedozi (procurement/payment startup) as first business hire](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
      - [Handled sales, marketing, and customer success](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Currently at Outgo (FinTech company) for the past year](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [Focused on automating inbound flow and optimizing sales processes](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
      - [Company is being acquired, prompting job search](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)

### Relevant Experience and Skills

  - [Expertise in RevOps, including both operational and data/analytics aspects](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Experience in early-stage startups and solving ambiguous problems](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Strong background in process automation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Familiarity with tools like HubSpot, Webflow, and custom internal systems](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

### Future Career Aspirations

  - [Enjoys startup environment and solving ambiguous problems](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Interested in having a broader scope within a company](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Open to expanding into lead gen and traditional RevOps work](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

### Process Improvement Example

  - [At Outgo, redesigned inbound lead process:](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [Created automated flow from interest form submission to activation](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
      - [Implemented lead routing based on deal size](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
      - [Developed 12-step task sequence in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
      - [Integrated Slack notifications for risk team communication](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
      - [Automated deal stage progression through webhooks](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

### growthx.ai's Future Opportunities

  - [Potential to expand beyond SEO into other content areas:](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
      - [Sales enablement tools using research-based workflows](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
      - [Lead magnets and conversion elements](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)

      - [Content repurposing and distribution strategies](https://fathom.video/share/PcAb2bJJf6ASeDnq4ZJ7FSXcGzyACpaT?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
